skill.name: xiaohongshu-copywriter
skill.description: 小红书爆款文案自动生成器 — 输入产品/卖点，3篇完整笔记+标题+标签+封面
skill.summary: 小红书爆款文案自动生成器 — 输入产品/卖点，3篇完整笔记+标题+标签+封面
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged two high-severity patterns that are false positives. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' finding at SKILL.md line 4 matches Chinese description text in YAML frontmatter, not actual cryptography. The 'high file entropy' finding at SKILL.md line 1 is caused by UTF-8 encoded Chinese characters, which naturally have higher byte entropy than ASCII text. The skill contains only benign markdown text with no executable code, network calls, file system operations, or external commands.

content.user_title: Generate Viral Xiaohongshu Posts in Seconds
content.value_statement: Creating engaging Xiaohongshu content requires creativity and time. This skill generates three complete notes with titles, tags, and cover suggestions from any product or selling point input.
actual_capabilities: Generate three complete Xiaohongshu notes from a single product or selling point input
Create attention-grabbing titles optimized for the Xiaohongshu algorithm
Suggest relevant hashtags and tags to improve post discoverability
Recommend cover image concepts to maximize click-through rates
Adapt writing style for different product categories and audiences
Output fully formatted, ready-to-publish Chinese social media content
limitations: Content quality depends on the specificity and detail of the user input
All generated content requires human review before publishing
Optimized specifically for Chinese-language Xiaohongshu platform
Does not generate actual images, only text-based cover suggestions

use_cases.title: E-Commerce Product Promotion
use_cases.description: Generate engaging posts to showcase products on Xiaohongshu storefronts and drive sales

use_cases.title: Brand Social Media Management
use_cases.description: Create consistent, high-quality content for brand accounts to build audience engagement

use_cases.title: Freelance Content Scaling
use_cases.description: Produce multiple post variations quickly for client deliverables and content calendars

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Post
prompt_templates.prompt: I sell [product name]. Generate 3 Xiaohongshu posts with titles, tags, and cover ideas.

prompt_templates.title: Campaign Launch Post
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a promotional campaign for [product] targeting [audience]. Include 3 posts with urgency hooks and calls to action.

prompt_templates.title: Lifestyle Integration Post
prompt_templates.prompt: Write 3 Xiaohongshu posts that naturally integrate [product] into [lifestyle scenario]. Focus on storytelling and authenticity.

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Product Comparison Series
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 3-post series comparing [product A] vs [product B]. Each post should highlight different angles: features, price-value, and user experience.

output_examples.input: Organic skincare serum for sensitive skin with hyaluronic acid and niacinamide
output_examples.output: Three complete posts including titles like 'My Sensitive Skin Savior After 30 Days', tags such as #skincare #sensitiveskin #hyaluronicacid, and cover suggestions showing before/after skin texture

output_examples.input: Weekend getaway to a mountain hot spring resort in autumn
output_examples.output: Three travel posts with immersive storytelling titles like 'Escaping the City: Hidden Hot Springs', location tags, seasonal cover concepts with red maple leaves, and restaurant recommendations

best_practices: Provide specific product details and unique selling points for better output quality
Always review and personalize generated content before publishing to maintain brand voice
Use the generated tags as a starting point and add current trending hashtags for reach
anti_patterns: Do not publish generated content without fact-checking product claims and specifications
Avoid using the same template repeatedly without customization to prevent content fatigue
Do not rely solely on AI output for regulated product categories such as medical or financial services

faq.question: What is Xiaohongshu?
faq.answer: Xiaohongshu is a popular Chinese social media and e-commerce platform focused on lifestyle, beauty, and product recommendations.

faq.question: Do I need to know Chinese to use this skill?
faq.answer: The skill generates Chinese content, but you can provide input in English or Chinese. The AI will match the output language to the platform.

faq.question: Can this skill generate images?
faq.answer: No, the skill provides text-based cover image suggestions and concepts only. You will need to create or source the actual images separately.

faq.question: How many posts does it generate at once?
faq.answer: The skill generates three complete posts with titles, tags, and cover ideas for each request, giving you options to choose from.

faq.question: Is the generated content ready to publish?
faq.answer: The content is formatted and structured, but human review is recommended before publishing to ensure accuracy and brand alignment.

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
